name: dpdc-balance
title: DPDC Balance
description: Check prepaid electricity balance for DPDC accounts
author: masnun-siam

commands.name: my-meters
commands.title: My Meters
commands.subtitle: DPDC
commands.description: View and manage your saved DPDC meters

commands.name: check-balance
commands.title: Check Balance
commands.subtitle: DPDC
commands.description: Check balance for any DPDC Customer ID

commands.name: balance-menu-bar
commands.title: Balance
commands.subtitle: DPDC
commands.description: Show primary meter balance in the menu bar

preferences.name: alertThreshold
preferences.title: Alert Threshold (৳)
preferences.description: Balance at or below this amount triggers a low-balance indicator (red icon/title)

preferences.name: refreshInterval
preferences.title: Refresh Interval
preferences.description: How often views auto-refresh cached balances
